description: Add running P&L area chart to trade detail page

userStories.title: Audit Existing Utilities for Running P&L
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing code before implementing the running P&L chart so that we reuse utilities and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm calculateFuturesPnL exists in src/lib/market-data/symbols.ts
Confirm calculateForexPnL exists in src/lib/market-data/symbols.ts
Confirm calculateRunningPnl is LOCAL helper in src/components/trade-detail/replay/use-replay-engine.ts (needs extraction)
Document findings in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Audit complete. All P&L functions confirmed at expected locations. calculateRunningPnl needs extraction from replay engine.

userStories.title: Extract Running P&L Calculation Utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared utility function for calculating running P&L so that both the replay feature and running P&L chart can use the same logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/trades/running-pnl.ts with calculateRunningPnlAtTime() function
Create generateRunningPnlSeries() that returns array of { time: number, pnl: number }
generateRunningPnlSeries accepts: bars[], executions[], direction, symbol, instrumentType
Handles partial exits correctly (accumulated realized P&L + current unrealized)
Reuses calculateFuturesPnL and calculateForexPnL from @/lib/market-data/symbols.ts
Export functions from src/lib/trades/index.ts
Update use-replay-engine.ts to import from shared utility (remove local calculateRunningPnl helper)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/trades/running-pnl.ts with calculateRunningPnlAtTime() and generateRunningPnlSeries(). Updated use-replay-engine.ts to import from shared utility.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Running P&L Utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for the running P&L calculation utility so that we can verify correct P&L calculations across different scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: tests/integration/running-pnl.test.ts
Tests long trade P&L calculation (profit and loss scenarios)
Tests short trade P&L calculation (profit and loss scenarios)
Tests partial exit handling (scale-outs with realized P&L)
Tests both futures (ES, NQ) and forex (EUR/USD) symbols
Tests empty bars/executions edge cases return empty array or zero
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created comprehensive test suite covering long/short trades, partial exits, futures (ES, NQ, MES) and forex (EUR/USD, GBP/USD) symbols, edge cases. Typecheck passes. Tests require Docker/Orbstack to run.

userStories.title: Create Running P&L Chart Component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see an area chart showing my trade's P&L over time so that I can visualize how the trade performed throughout its duration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RunningPnlChart component in src/components/trade-detail/running-pnl-chart.tsx
Uses AG Charts (ag-charts-react) following MonthlyChart pattern from src/components/analytics/monthly-chart.tsx
Area chart fills entire tab height (flex-1)
X-axis shows timestamps in user's timezone using useTimezone hook
Y-axis shows P&L in dollars with proper formatting
Split coloring: green fill (#00ff8820) above zero, red fill (#ff3b3b20) below zero
Uses ANALYTICS_COLORS from src/lib/analytics/constants.ts
Tooltip shows timestamp and P&L value
Terminal design system styling (transparent background, monospace labels)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Created RunningPnlChart component with AG Charts area chart. Features: split coloring (profit/loss), timezone-aware timestamps via useTimezone, monospace Terminal styling, tooltip with full timestamp and P&L, adaptive label density for large datasets. Browser verification pending - requires US-004 integration first.

userStories.title: Add Execution Markers to Chart
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see entry, exit, and scale-in/out points marked on the P&L chart so that I can correlate price action with my trading decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add marker series to RunningPnlChart for executions
Entry marker: chartreuse (#d4ff00) diamond or triangle shape
Exit marker: distinct shape (circle or square)
Scale-in/out markers: smaller version of entry/exit markers
Hover tooltip shows execution type, price, and quantity
Markers positioned at correct time and P&L value on chart
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added execution markers as scatter series to RunningPnlChart. Entry markers: chartreuse diamond (size 14), Exit markers: ice blue circle (size 12), Scale-in: chartreuse triangle (size 10), Scale-out: ice blue square (size 10). Tooltips show execution type, time, price, quantity, and P&L at execution point. Browser verification pending - requires US-004 integration first.

userStories.title: Integrate Chart with Trade Detail Content Panel
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the Running P&L tab to display the chart when I select it so that I can view my trade's P&L progression.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace placeholder content in ContentPanel's running-pnl tab (src/components/trade-detail/content-panel.tsx)
Fetch OHLC bar data using existing market data tRPC endpoint
Use same interval logic as trade replay (match bar granularity)
Show loading state while fetching data
Handle error states gracefully (show message if data unavailable)
Chart fills available tab space (full height)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Created RunningPnlTab component that fetches OHLC data using same endpoint as TradeReplay (getFullDayChartData). Generates P&L series with generateRunningPnlSeries utility. Shows loading/error/no-data states. Chart fills full tab height. Executions passed through to chart for marker rendering.

userStories.title: Fix: Stop P&L Calculation at Trade Exit
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the running P&L chart to stop at my exit price so that the final P&L is accurate and doesn't continue showing price movement after I closed the trade.
acceptanceCriteria: generateRunningPnlSeries stops generating points after exit execution time
Final P&L point uses exit price (not subsequent bar prices)
For closed trades, chart ends at exit time with correct realized P&L
For open trades (no exit), chart continues to last bar as before
Update tests to verify exit time boundary behavior
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: closed trade P&L matches trade stats
userStories.notes: Modified generateRunningPnlSeries to detect exit execution and stop after exit time. Uses exit price for final P&L accuracy. Added 6 new tests for exit time boundary behavior. Typecheck passes. Tests require Docker/Orbstack to run.
